bySection.heading: Step 4: Create a schema and a model

codeBlocks.content: const Blog = mongoose.model('Blog', blog);

mkdir mongodb-mongoose
cd mongodb-mongoose
npm init -y
npm i mongoose
npm i -D nodemon
npm run dev

import mongoose from 'mongoose';

mongoose.connect("<connection string>")

Error: Invalid email format

const blog = await Blog.exists({ author: 'Jess Garcia' });
console.log(blog);

const blog = await Blog.findOne().where("author").equals("Jess Garcia").select("title author");
console.log(blog);
